title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 475.544 - State law applicability
text:
475.544.  State law applicability. — Except where inconsistent with sections 475.541, 475.542, and 475.543, the laws of this state relating to the registration and recognition of the acts of a foreign guardian, curator, or conservator contained in sections 475.335 to 475.340 shall be applicable.
(L. 2011 H.B. 111 merged with S.B. 59 merged with S.B. 213)
